summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 5 new games in Lluvia Live platform. All games working perfectly with full backend-frontend integration.
passed_tests: Backend API: POST /api/games/ruleta with bet_amount and user_id
Backend API: POST /api/games/dados with proper dice mechanics
Backend API: POST /api/games/piedra-papel-tijera with choice parameter
Backend API: GET /api/games/trivia/question returns random questions
Backend API: POST /api/games/trivia with answer_index validation
Backend API: POST /api/games/carta-mayor with guess parameter
Backend API: Error handling for insufficient coins (400 status)
Frontend: Games tab navigation from Dashboard
Frontend: All 5 games displayed with beautiful gradient cards
Frontend: Bet amount selection (100, 500, 1K, 5K, 10K)
Frontend: Ruleta game - spin mechanics and result display
Frontend: Dados game - dice rolling and victory conditions
Frontend: Piedra Papel Tijera - choice selection and vs computer
Frontend: Trivia game - question loading and answer submission
Frontend: Carta Mayor - card comparison and mayor/menor logic
Frontend: Real-time balance updates after each game
Frontend: Game result display with win/loss indicators
Frontend: Navigation between games and back to games list
Integration: Perfect frontend-backend communication
Integration: Balance persistence across games
